title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw on Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Donate One (1) Unit of Nissan Cargo Ambulance with Conduction Sticker Number F4568 to Barangay Tuntungin-putho Purchased by the Municipal Government Thru Cost Sharing Scheme, the LGU Share Charged to General Fund - Supplemental Budget, with a Total Amount of One Million Eight Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos (P 1,850,000.00). (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 07/12/2021)
